title: Palma, Balearic Islands — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Palma, Balearic Islands: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Palma is a city in Balearic Islands with a population of 420,000. The capital of Mallorca with a stunning Gothic cathedral, beautiful beaches, and a vibrant Mediterranean lifestyle.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
